title: RenderKit Surface Gallery
description: Example artifacts for each supported surface type. Each file is a valid .rk.md that passes validation.

surfaces.label: Engineering Plan
surfaces.description: Structured technical proposal with decisions, diagrams, and risk callouts.

surfaces.label: Decision Brief
surfaces.description: Focused decision document with alternatives analysis and blockers.

surfaces.label: Review Report
surfaces.description: Audit findings with severity-mapped callouts and code snippets.

surfaces.label: Runbook
surfaces.description: Step-by-step operational procedure with rollback and diagrams.

surfaces.label: Data Report Lite
surfaces.description: Lightweight data summary with key metrics and methodology.
